# omada_site_settings (Resource)

Manages site-wide settings (a singleton): LED, mesh, roaming, band steering, airtime fairness, LLDP, auto-upgrade, alerts, remote logging, speed test and RF beacon control.

Unset attributes keep their current controller value. The device account (a credential) and read-only metadata are never touched. Destroying this resource does not reset anything.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "omada_site_settings" "this" {
  led_enable = true # device status LEDs on
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `advanced_feature_enable` (Boolean) Advanced features.
- `airtime_fairness_2g` (Boolean) Airtime fairness on 2.4GHz.
- `airtime_fairness_5g` (Boolean) Airtime fairness on 5GHz.
- `airtime_fairness_6g` (Boolean) Airtime fairness on 6GHz.
- `alert_delay` (Number) Alert delay (seconds).
- `alert_delay_enable` (Boolean) Delay before alerting.
- `alert_enable` (Boolean) Alerts.
- `auto_upgrade_enable` (Boolean) Automatic firmware upgrades.
- `band_steering_connection_threshold` (Number) Band-steering connection threshold.
- `band_steering_difference_threshold` (Number) Band-steering difference threshold.
- `band_steering_enable` (Boolean) Band steering.
- `band_steering_max_failures` (Number) Band-steering max failures.
- `band_steering_multi_band_mode` (Number) Multi-band band-steering mode.
- `beacon_dtim_period_2g` (Number) DTIM period (2.4GHz).
- `beacon_dtim_period_5g` (Number) DTIM period (5GHz).
- `beacon_dtim_period_6g` (Number) DTIM period (6GHz).
- `beacon_fragmentation_threshold_2g` (Number) Fragmentation threshold (2.4GHz).
- `beacon_fragmentation_threshold_5g` (Number) Fragmentation threshold (5GHz).
- `beacon_fragmentation_threshold_6g` (Number) Fragmentation threshold (6GHz).
- `beacon_interval_6g` (Number) Beacon interval (6GHz).
- `beacon_intv_mode_2g` (Number) Beacon interval mode (2.4GHz).
- `beacon_intv_mode_5g` (Number) Beacon interval mode (5GHz).
- `beacon_intv_mode_6g` (Number) Beacon interval mode (6GHz).
- `beacon_rts_threshold_2g` (Number) RTS threshold (2.4GHz).
- `beacon_rts_threshold_5g` (Number) RTS threshold (5GHz).
- `beacon_rts_threshold_6g` (Number) RTS threshold (6GHz).
- `channel_limit_enable` (Boolean) Channel limit.
- `led_enable` (Boolean) Device status LEDs.
- `lldp_enable` (Boolean) LLDP.
- `mesh_auto_failover` (Boolean) Mesh auto-failover.
- `mesh_default_gateway` (Boolean) Mesh default gateway.
- `mesh_enable` (Boolean) Mesh networking.
- `mesh_full_sector` (Boolean) Mesh full-sector DFS.
- `remember_device_enable` (Boolean) Remember clients.
- `remote_log_enable` (Boolean) Remote syslog.
- `remote_log_more_client_log` (Boolean) Verbose client logging.
- `remote_log_port` (Number) Remote syslog port.
- `roaming_ai_roaming_enable` (Boolean) AI roaming.
- `roaming_dual_band_11k_report_enable` (Boolean) Dual-band 802.11k reports.
- `roaming_fast_roaming_enable` (Boolean) 802.11r fast roaming.
- `roaming_force_disassociation_enable` (Boolean) Force disassociation.
- `roaming_non_ping_pong_enable` (Boolean) Anti ping-pong roaming.
- `roaming_non_stick_enable` (Boolean) Non-sticky roaming.
- `site` (String) Site name. Defaults to the primary site. Changing forces replacement.
- `speed_test_enable` (Boolean) Periodic WAN speed test.
- `speed_test_interval` (Number) Speed-test interval (minutes).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The site ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Site settings are a singleton — import by SITE NAME (not an object id):
terraform import omada_site_settings.this Home
```
